notes: Troubleshooting template articles. Ground truth: fetch the LIVE article for the real causes/fixes and rewrite to the template (Symptom / Most likely cause / Quick fix / If that didn't work / Still stuck / Prevent this). Order fixes least-destructive first. Every article: 'Still stuck' section links [[diagnostic-report]] and [[get-help]]; 'Prevent this' links its setup guide ([[connect-dxfeed]] for dxFeed errors, [[connect-rithmic]] / [[rtrader-pro-plugin]] for Rithmic errors, [[connect-data-feed]] generally, [[sign-market-data-agreement]] for agreement-related, [[symbol-manage]] where mapping is the cause). data-delayed-lagging is NEW - build the checklist from: /Users/flutter/Desktop/ai-support-system/knowledge/playbooks/troubleshooting (if present) + these verified facts: confirm delay vs disconnect (feed dot, delayed banner), ? > Contact Support diagnostic ping/download speed per region, dxFeed DOM Type MBO->MBP on slow lines, Rithmic gateway selection by speed test, R Trader Pro performance sliders, LDT badge = loading from disk vs DWT = downloading.
